title: Morning Is The Place For Dew,
content:
Morning is the place for dew,
    Corn is made at noon,
    After dinner light for flowers,
    Dukes for setting sun!
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Morning Is The Place For Dew,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
